questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'unless' с Present Simple?

choices.text: Unless you will call, I won't know.
Unless you call, I won't know.
Unless you called, I won't know.
Unless you are calling, I won't know.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple для будущего значения, поэтому 'call' правильный вариант.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант верен для 'as long as'?

choices.text: We will go as long as you will agree.
We will go as long as you agree.
We will go as long as you agreed.
We will go as long as you are agreeing.

questions.explanation: После 'as long as' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'agree' правильный вариант.

choices.text: Provided you will finish, we will start.
Provided you finish, we will start.
Provided you finished, we will start.
Provided you are finishing, we will start.

questions.explanation: После 'provided' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'finish' правильный вариант.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант верен для 'unless' с будущим значением?

choices.text: Unless you will arrive, we will start without you.
Unless you arrive, we will start without you.
Unless you arrived, we will start without you.
Unless you are arriving, we will start without you.

questions.explanation: В условной части после 'unless' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'arrive' правильный вариант.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'as long as'?

choices.text: They will leave as long as the weather will be good.
They will leave as long as the weather is good.
They will leave as long as the weather was good.
They will leave as long as the weather has been good.

questions.explanation: После 'as long as' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'is' правильный вариант.

choices.text: Provided you will arrive on time, we will wait.
Provided you arrive on time, we will wait.
Provided you arrived on time, we will wait.
Provided you are arriving on time, we will wait.

questions.explanation: После 'provided' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'arrive' правильный вариант.

choices.text: Unless you will study, you won't pass.
Unless you study, you won't pass.
Unless you studied, you won't pass.
Unless you are studying, you won't pass.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'study' правильный вариант.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант верен для 'as long as'?

choices.text: She will attend as long as she will be paid.
She will attend as long as she is paid.
She will attend as long as she was paid.
She will attend as long as she has been paid.

questions.explanation: После 'as long as' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'is' правильный вариант.

choices.text: Provided you will help, we will succeed.
Provided you help, we will succeed.
Provided you helped, we will succeed.
Provided you are helping, we will succeed.

questions.explanation: После 'provided' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'help' правильный вариант.

choices.text: Unless you will come, we will cancel.
Unless you come, we will cancel.
Unless you came, we will cancel.
Unless you are coming, we will cancel.

questions.explanation: После 'unless' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'come' правильный вариант.
